results.name: virtual french vanilla
results.description: Creatures and vehicles that are french vanilla (having only keyword abilities) after entering the battlefield. They may have "enters the battlefield" or "on cast" trigger.

results.name: virtual legendary
results.description: This card represents a one-of-a-kind creature or object, and could conceivably have been legendary. Usually cards are in this category because they were printed before legendary existed or have a mechanical need to not be legendary.

results.name: virtual proliferate
results.description: Effects that sorta-proliferate some counters.

results.name: virtual vanilla
results.description: These creatures are effectively just vanilla after entering the battlefield. They may have an enters-the-battlefield or on-cast trigger.

results.description: Guts! Gross.

results.name: vision
results.description: Prophetic visions and similar.

results.name: visual pun
results.description: Visual Jokes that involve a play on words

results.name: vivid
results.description: Cards that care about the number of colors among permanents you control.

results.name: vizzerdrix
results.description: A bunny/pirahna hybrid creature. Seeing one is probably bad news.
